footer.brand_tagline: The future of humanitarian action is built locally.

contact.location_kinshasa: Avenue du Bas-Congo No. 835, Commune de la Gombe, Kinshasa, DR Congo
contact.location_bunia: Avenue Shari No. 35, Quartier Lumumba, Commune Mbunya, Ville de Bunia — Ituri, DR Congo

footer.copyright: © 2026 ToGETHER Networking RDCongo. All rights reserved.

pages.meta_desc: ToGETHER Networking RDCongo connects local humanitarian actors to strengthen collaboration and local leadership in the Democratic Republic of Congo.

financement.heading: Funding
financement.title: Funding Opportunities
financement.desc: The funding module will centralise calls for projects, grants and partnership opportunities for local NGOs in DRC. Stay informed from launch.
financement.feature1: ECHO, AFD, UNICEF project calls and more
financement.feature2: Filters by province, sector and amount
financement.feature3: Email alerts as soon as a new opportunity is published

evenements.heading: Events
evenements.title: Calendar & Events
evenements.desc: The calendar will bring together trainings, cluster meetings, provincial coordination forums and all key events of the local humanitarian network in DRC.
evenements.feature4: Inter-provincial agenda updated in real time

sujets.heading: Topics & Library
sujets.title: Topics & Resource Library
sujets.desc: The resource library will bring together advocacy notes, impact reports, thematic guides and technical documents shared by network members.
sujets.feature1: Impact reports and field case studies
sujets.feature3: Thematic guides by sector of intervention
sujets.feature4: Resources organised by province and cluster

succes.heading: Success Stories
succes.title: Success Stories
succes.desc: This section will highlight the concrete achievements of member NGOs — field testimonials, real impact figures and stories that illustrate the strength of local humanitarian leadership.
succes.feature1: Testimonials from beneficiaries and assisted communities
succes.feature3: Case studies by sector and province
